summary: Frontend-only Protocole Summer Build dashboard tested end-to-end. All 14 acceptance criteria pass: dashboard loads, all data-testids present (header, clock, progress ring, 7 tasks, 5 rules, 3 workout blocks, 4 stat cells, 7 week-bars, footer), toggling tasks updates progress (0% -> 14% -> 100%), 100% triggers confetti+success toast, reset clears, localStorage persists across reload, workout timer counts down (15:00 -> 14:58) and resets, active task highlighting (1 pulse-volt element) works (18:00 'EN COURS' shown at test time 23:02).

issues: Empty days (value=0) render as nearly-invisible 3% sliver bars; weekday labels shown but bars look missing for fresh users with no history. Consider a slightly more visible empty-state bar or placeholder.

critical_code_review_comments: useProtocolStore: shutdown task uses timeMinutes=24*60+30=1470 which is > minutesNow max (~1439). computeActiveTaskId explicitly skips shutdown in the loop and only activates 'shutdown' for now<120 (00:00-02:00). Between 02:00 and 09:30, no task is active (active=null) - matches intent but worth confirming product expectation.
Midnight reset logic only runs on mount; users keeping the tab open across midnight will not see auto-reset until reload. Consider a setInterval that re-checks date or use date-change effect.

Streak only increments when previous day was yesterday AND 100%; if user skips a day completely the streak silently stays 0 - fine, but bestStreak update only happens during midnight transition, never on real-time toggles (acceptable since streak only changes at midnight).
No data-testid on individual workout-block detail or footer items beyond root; acceptable for this scope.
seed_data_creation: localStorage cleared before test then populated through normal UI flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend app, no backend. State in localStorage key 'protocole-summer-build:v1'. All required data-testids present and working. Active task computed via computeActiveTaskId (currently 'physical' at 18:00 window). Verified at 23:02 local time on 31 Mai 2026.
